title: SmartestEnergy and AGR sign CfD-backed PPAs for four solar and storage projects - Solar Power Portal
snippet: SmartestEnergy and AGR sign CfD-backed PPAs for four solar and storage projects  Solar Power Portal
ai_summary: SmartestEnergy has secured CfD-backed PPAs for solar and storage projects, demonstrating competitor strength in the PPA market where tem also competes.
ai_reasoning: SmartestEnergy is a direct competitor. This shows their activity in securing PPAs for renewable generators—a core tem market. The deal size and CfD backing suggest competitive pressure in the renewables offtake space.

title: AGR picks SmartestEnergy to run market access for 192 MW of UK solar - Renewables Now
snippet: AGR picks SmartestEnergy to run market access for 192 MW of UK solar  Renewables Now
ai_summary: SmartestEnergy appointed as market access provider for 192 MW of solar, indicating continued competitor strength in serving generators.
ai_reasoning: Direct evidence of a competitor winning a significant generator mandate (192 MW). This is tem's core market segment. The appointment shows SmartestEnergy's capability to attract and retain generator clients.

title: Renewable energy will boost national security and protect UK from sabotage, minister says | Renewable energy
ai_summary: Government messaging on renewable energy boosting national security and energy resilience supports the broader policy environment for tem's renewable energy business.
ai_reasoning: Background reading on supportive policy sentiment. No immediate commercial impact, but reinforces the political backdrop favouring renewables suppliers. Useful for context but no action required this week.
